default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, AI images, and a new AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Workflow:** Minor article edits will be made *after* medical review to avoid rework. Systemic issues will be fixed in the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [**AI Image Feedback:** Use only "lifelike" images that don't distract readers. Avoid "soap opera effect" visuals or those that look like an IQ test.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**New AEO Strategy:** Growth X will propose a strategy for non-product content to capture AEO visibility, starting with editorial articles in a new Shopify blog.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Deeper Integration:** Biologica is exploring Obello, a new DAM, to create more on-brand AI assets and potentially integrate Growth X into the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Quality

  - [**Process:** To avoid rework, minor edits will be applied *after* medical review. Systemic issues will be fixed in the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [**Pacing:** Growth X is catching up by delivering 6 new articles, all produced post-pipeline adjustment.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Quality:** The "Iron" article's opening was praised as relatable.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**CTAs:** The current multi-product CTA format is an improvement. Growth X is open to tweaks, like calling out one product in-text while showing others as cards.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### AI Image Feedback

  - [**Principle:** Images must be "lifelike" and unobtrusive.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**"Good" Examples:** Simple, realistic photos (e.g., flowers) that don't distract.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [**"Bad" Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**"Soap opera effect" visuals:** Look obviously AI-generated.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Unrealistic physics:** Water ripples in a glass that wouldn't occur.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Distracting imagery:** An "x-ray" of a pear or a flower with an impossible shadow.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Delivery:** Growth X will provide \~2 image options per article in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**Backup Plan:** If options are unsuitable, publish with a placeholder and replace it later from the growing Shopify media library.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### New AEO Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Capture AEO visibility with non-product content relevant to the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Initial Scope:** Editorial-style articles for a quick win.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**Technical Needs (Editorial Articles):**](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [A separate Shopify blog (via a new breadcrumb).](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [Support for standard text blocks and an FAQ section.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Shopify's 50-block-per-page limit requires dev agency consultation.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Future Scope (Data-Driven Directory):**](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [A more complex project requiring a custom data pipeline and dev cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Example:** A directory of supplement ingredients.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [Deliver 6 new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Provide 2 AI image options per article in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [Propose AEO strategy with content samples and tech requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [**Biologica:**](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Review new articles and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/9X8fpTs23zgS8VLBhrxnMt1y5DbDV2GY?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
